title: Genomics of Volvocine Algae.
author: Umen JG Olson BJ
content: S-EPMC4396658 PMC4396658 Genomics of Volvocine Algae. Volvocine algae are a group of chlorophytes that together comprise a unique model for evolutionary and developmental biology. The species Chlamydomonas reinhardtii and Volvox carteri represent extremes in morphological diversity
